QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: Other Investment Products_18

question.text: The Reverse Mortgage Scheme is available to senior citizens aged:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Reverse Mortgage Scheme is available to senior citizens aged 60 years and above who own a residential property. The property must be self-occupied and free from encumbrance. **The Trap:** 55 years applies to SCSS for VRS retirees. 65 years is too high. The general eligibility for reverse mortgage is 60 years. **Cross-Exam Context:** Reverse mortgage eligibility is specific to Series XVII. It is one of the few products that monetizes an illiquid asset (home) into regular income. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Reverse mortgage is a last-resort strategy for asset-rich, income-poor retirees. Ensure clients understand the implications for heirs before recommending.
